option.name: originalContent
option.value: <resources> <!-- Base application theme. --> <style name="Base.Theme.TaleXAndroidApp" parent="Theme.Material3.DayNight.NoActionBar"> <!-- Use system black for primary in dark theme --> <item name="colorPrimary">@android:color/black</item> <item name="colorOnPrimary">@android:color/white</item> <item name="colorPrimaryContainer">@android:color/black</item> <item name="colorOnPrimaryContainer">@android:color/white</item> </style> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <resources> <!-- Base application theme. --> <style name="Base.Theme.TaleXAndroidApp" parent="Theme.Material3.DayNight.NoActionBar"> <!-- Use system black for primary in dark theme --> <item name="colorPrimary">@android:color/black</item> <item name="colorOnPrimary">@android:color/white</item> <item name="colorPrimaryContainer">@android:color/black</item> <item name="colorOnPrimaryContainer">@android:color/white</item> </style> </resources>
